title: poa nemoralis var. fertilis
intro: Poa nemoralis var. fertilis, also known as the Wood Meadow-grass, is a subspecies of the Poa nemoralis plant, a type of perennial grass native to Europe. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and reduce swelling. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Poa nemoralis var. fertilis can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to the skin.
